approach: PyPI / GitHub library survey (no live run)
notes: Both libraries are dominated by Approach 4 (Playwright headless + XHR intercept + RU residential proxy). YMRP needs a visible browser; arsenyvolodko's lib needs a paid apikey for name lookup and Selenium Chrome for reviews, returning only (rating, text).
